We've been
here before.

.objective

Equip young people for the future.

The Future of Work XP was a 5-station interactive experience on the future of work — where youth could learn, debate and imagine what comes next.

Designed with specialists, each station was immersive, pedagogical and participatory. Three editions. Three continents. Thousands of young people.

.editions
Mar 2018
Buenos Aires,
Argentina
Campus Party Argentina
Edition 01
Jul 2019
West Virginia,
USA
Leadership Summit
Edition 02
Nov 2019
Doha,
Qatar
WISE Learning Days
Edition 03
.the experience
.stations

Five stations.
One experience.

01
Escape Room
Solve logic and lateral thinking challenges under time pressure. Creativity, complex problem solving, cognitive flexibility.
02
Moral Lab
Inspired by MIT experiments. Navigate uncomfortable moral dilemmas through a "choose your own adventure" format.
03
Human Machine
How can you prove you are human? Discover the skills machines cannot replicate — and why they matter for the future.
04
Collaborator
A multiplayer collaborative video game where teams solve complex challenges together. Leadership, communication, teamwork.
05
Alternative Futures
What is your idea of the future? Participants challenge standardized visions and imagine new ones.

UMBRAL is
what comes next.

Explore UMBRAL
